title: Founder OS HQ - Meetings
description: Consolidated meetings database merging P03 Meeting Prep Autopilot prep notes and P07 Meeting Intelligence Hub analyses. A single meeting record holds both prep and analysis data, linked by Event ID.

Event ID.description: Google Calendar Event ID, idempotent key shared between P03 and P07

Company.description: Optional: associated company for external meetings

Sources Used.description: P03: Data sources used for prep

Transcript File.description: P07: Path to saved transcript file

notes: Both P03 and P07 share the Event ID as idempotent key. When P03 creates a record for prep, P07 updates the same record with analysis fields (and vice versa). Company relation populated when meeting attendees match CRM contacts. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Meetings' first, then fall back to 'Meeting Prep Autopilot - Prep Notes' or 'Meeting Intelligence Hub - Analyses'.
